expr: const e=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')].find(x=>x.value==='CLEAN'); if(!e) return {ok:false}; const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set; setter.call(e,'CLEAN_TEST'); e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); e.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); e.blur&&e.blur(); return {ok:true,val:e.value};
